tooltip.gatesofavarice.stability_pearl.e: +15s gateway time, -10% max health for the rest of the gate
screen.gatesofavarice.shopkeeper.title: Gatekeeper
command.gatesofavarice.coins.player_only: Only a player can use this command.
command.gatesofavarice.coins.not_enough: You do not have enough Mythic Coins.
command.gatesofavarice.coins.direct_id_o: Use a direct player id or name. Selectors are not allowed.
command.gatesofavarice.coins.multiplier: Set your Mythic Coin multiplier to %s.
jei.gatesofavarice.info.crystals.0: Crystals are the base component for the Gateway Workbench.
jei.gatesofavarice.info.crystals.1: Higher tier crystals support stronger generated gateways and rewards.
jei.gatesofavarice.info.augments.0: Augments raise gateway difficulty and push rewards upward when inserted into the Gateway Workbench.
jei.gatesofavarice.info.augments.1: Different rolls carry different effects and can significantly change the resulting gateway.
jei.gatesofavarice.info.catalysts.0: Catalysts add tradeoffs in the Gateway Workbench, exchanging safety, pressure, and loot.
jei.gatesofavarice.info.catalysts.1: Different catalyst rolls change the tradeoff between safety, pressure, and rewards.
